fixes.whatChanged: Replaced the shared /tmp/gogent-fallback location with a per-user fallback directory, forced 0700 permissions on that fallback, and covered the unsafe-path cases in config tests.
fixes.notes: The writability probe now preserves pre-existing directory permissions instead of broadening them during fallback checks.

fixes.whatChanged: Moved the data-directory fallback to a per-user 0700 temp path and stabilized the routing-decision fallback test by pinning HOME to a writable temp directory.
fixes.notes: This keeps routing/review telemetry isolated even in sandboxed or read-only-home environments.
